summary: All requested features tested and working correctly. Teachers page is now PUBLIC (no auth required), Login/Signup with email/password works, protected routes redirect to login, logout clears session properly.
critical_code_review_comments: Previous iteration noted password_hash exposure in /api/auth/me - should be verified if fixed

test_credentials.note: Test users created during UI testing

seed_data_creation: No seed data required - tests create their own test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: 1) Landing page loads with stats counter (46 sessions, 28 students, 3 teachers), 2) Teachers page is PUBLIC - accessible without authentication, 3) Login page shows email/password form with Remember Me option, 4) Signup creates new account and redirects to dashboard, 5) Login with email/password works correctly, 6) Protected routes (/dashboard/*, /profile, /book/*) redirect to login when not authenticated, 7) Logout clears session properly, 8) Browse Teachers button on landing page goes to /teachers (not /login)

landing_page.details: Landing page loads correctly with stats counter showing 46 sessions, 28 students, 3 teachers

teachers_page_public.details: Teachers page is PUBLIC - loads without authentication, shows 3 teacher cards, login button visible for unauthenticated users

login_page.details: Login page shows email input, password input, Remember Me checkbox, submit button, Google login button, toggle mode button, back home button

signup_flow.details: Signup creates new account and redirects to /dashboard/student with session token stored in localStorage

login_flow.details: Login with email/password works correctly, redirects to dashboard with session token

protected_routes.details: All protected routes (/dashboard/student, /dashboard/teacher, /profile, /book/*) redirect to /login when not authenticated

browse_teachers_button.details: Browse Teachers button on landing page navigates to /teachers (not /login)
